creator: kib@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Steve Kargl from comment #16)
I think there are powerpc64 systems there, but I am not aware of the hosts names.

I made the changes locally, added missed ';' and rearranged Makefile.
I will post a new patch there after tinderbox is happy, or there is something
that is not clear to me how to fix.
